tagline: Groove-focused techno, chaotic energy, and raw industrial precision.
biography: Purum is a Bern-based DJ moving somewhere between groove-focused techno, house and chaotic late-night energy. His sets are built around tension, rhythm and unexpected turns — mixing hardgroove drums, old vocals, strange samples and hypnotic loops into something fast, raw and slightly surreal.
artistStatement: Influenced by underground clubs, vintage culture, internet nostalgia and futuristic visuals, the project goes beyond just DJing. Music, artwork, mixes and atmosphere all connect into the same world: dark, playful, cinematic and a bit unhinged. Less polished perfection, more feeling. Available for clubs, collectives, events and everything in between.
